meta.title: Learner Spotlight: My Journey into AI
meta.description:
Hear from a panel of MLEs sharing their first-hand experience and practical tips on building their AI career from different backgrounds. This event is co-hosted by DeepLearning.AI and Omdena.

Let us know what you think of the event by filling out a quick survey at https://bit.ly/3sliWLJ

Speakers:
-Farhad Sadeghlo (https://www.linkedin.com/in/farhad-sadeghlo/), Lead Machine Learning Engineer, Omdena
-Jianna Park (https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiannapark/), Software Engineer; Poet
-Sara EL-ATEIF (https://www.linkedin.com/in/sara-el-ateif-b36694117/), PhD student at ENSIAS, Morocco / Machine learning Engineer
-Madhu Charan (https://www.linkedin.com/in/madhucharan/), Undergraduate at SASTRA University, India, Junior Coach at Unschool


To learn more about us and signup for future events:
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/

To learn more about Omdena:
https://omdena.com/
